LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER OPHELIA LEE'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 5, 2011 FOR PETITIONER TO PROVIDE DEPT. 301 WITH ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS PER LOCAL 2.6(B) NO LATER THAN 3/21/11. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-18-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER OPHELIA LEE'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT RESPONDENT'S DECISION IS NOT SUPPORTED BY THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE OR THAT PLAINTIFF WAS PREVENTED FROM SUBMITTING RELEVANT EVIDENCE OR THAT RESPONDENT ABUSED ITS DISCRETION IN DETERMINING THE PENALTY. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS AND DAMAGES) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
